---
name: Marie
surname: Curie
position: "数据科学技能"
address: "数据科学技能"
phone: +1 22 3333 4444
www: mariecurie.com
email: "Marie.Curie@ens.fr"
twitter: mariecurie
github: mariecurie
linkedin: mariecurie
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %Y')`"
output: vitae::awesomecv
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{xeCJK}
---
\renewcommand*{\sectionstyle}[1]{{\fontsize{16pt}{1em}\bodyfont\bfseries\color{text}#1}}

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(vitae)
```

# 学术

 * 数据科学技能
 * 数据科学技能
 * 数据科学技能
